description:
Cross-platform fitting tool for EVE Online

Pyfa, short for python fitting assistant, allows you to create, experiment with, and save ship fittings without being in game. Open source and written in Python, it is available on any platform where Python 3 and wxWidgets are available, including Windows, macOS, and Linux.
Database:
- Update for the latest version of release 23.02, which includes:
  - New navy destroyers
Changes:
- One-file masOS builds to optimize startup time (#2765, thanks @Collinw24!)
- Added damage projection graph using best-case ammo (#2760, thanks @NicolasKion!)
Fixes:
- Heat time calculation errors with modules which decreased cycle time of overheated modules (#2756, thanks @AnsbigetHildElarik!)
